intent: Clear the current PR #24 Medium finding and make codex-cli comments show fixed and unfixed Medium/Medium+ issue status.
assumptions: The latest unresolved Medium is mobile drag target detection in FileCard.tsx.
FolderCard shares the same hit-stack risk and should use the same helper.
Existing full-file fallback line limits remain conservative.
Settings Back should fall back to /files only when there is no previous in-app route.
Empty string drag folder ids are root/absent sentinels, not backend folder ids.
List-level grid adapters should keep callbacks stable when they flow into memoized cards.
risks: Pointer hit stack behavior can differ by browser.
PrAutoFixOutput additions must preserve existing workflow fields.
Self-drop filtering must not block valid selected file moves into the target folder.
Settings direct-entry fallback must not break previous-route query restoration.
Explicit drag id filtering must preserve root target moves.
Stabilizing list adapters must preserve grouped, plain, and virtualized file-list behavior.
verification: cargo fmt --manifest-path scripts/codex-cli/Cargo.toml --check && cargo test --manifest-path scripts/codex-cli/Cargo.toml
